attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   EDC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
   EDC.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   EDC.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT  AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,  
   EDC.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY AS DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   EDC.PARTNER_COUNTRY       AS PARTNER_COUNTRY,        
   EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY   AS DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,       
  COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
   CASE 
    WHEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN -999 
    ELSE 
     CASE 
      WHEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
      ELSE 
       CASE 
        WHEN EDC.PARTNER_COUNTRY = EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
        ELSE 
         CASE 
          WHEN COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
          ELSE COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
         END
       END
     END
   END       AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
     CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN 'N' 
    ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N' 
     ELSE CASE WHEN DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = 'UNK' THEN 'N'
      ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_COUNTRY = DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  'N' 
       ELSE 'Y' 
      END
     END
    END
   END  AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
   EDC.AR_TRX_KEY,
   EDC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */,
   EDC.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PRT_CNTY_MTH EDC
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
     (
      SELECT 
        PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
             COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
            COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
        COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
           FROM 
             $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
             $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
      WHERE  1=1
      AND   PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
      AND   PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
      AND         PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
           QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
                                                             ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
                                                      ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1
                ) DSHIP
  ON  EDC.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
  AND  EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SELECT	    EDDP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
            EDDP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
            EDDP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
            EDDP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
            EDDP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
            EDDP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
            EDDP.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
            EDDP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
            EDDP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
            EDDP.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
            EBT.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
            RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE AS LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY,
            TEMP.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE      AS      PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,
            ECSN.RULE_CD                AS      RULE_CD,
            RCPH_SOLD_TO.GU_PARTY_KEY   AS    SOLD_TO_GUK,
            RCPH_END_CUST.GU_PARTY_KEY  AS END_CUST_GUK,
			CASE
                WHEN EDDP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
                WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ='WW Distribution' THEN 'N'
                WHEN COALESCE(TEMP.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,
		'UNKNOWN') ='DVAR' THEN 'Y'
                WHEN COALESCE(TEMP.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,
		'UNKNOWN') ='SP' THEN
            CASE
                WHEN COALESCE(ECSN.RULE_CD,
		'UNKNOWN')='PARTNER_TYPE_SP_CHECK' THEN 'N'
                WHEN COALESCE(ECSN.RULE_CD,
		'UNKNOWN')='CHK_GU_PARTY'  THEN
            CASE
                WHEN RCPH_SOLD_TO.GU_PARTY_KEY = RCPH_END_CUST.GU_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N'           
			ELSE 'Y'
            END        
			ELSE 'Y'
            END     
			ELSE 'N'
            END       AS CHANNEL_FLG,
                USER  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
                CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
                EDDP.AR_TRX_KEY,
				EDDP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				EDDP.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,
				EDDP.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */,
				EDDP.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
            FROM	$$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PART_PSPK_MTH EDDP     
			LEFT OUTER JOIN          (
	            SELECT	           NCPST.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
	                PARTNER_TYPE_CODE
	                FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPST          
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT         
		ON   NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY= NCPST.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY         
		AND  NCPST.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'         
		AND  NCPCT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'        ) TEMP    
				ON EDDP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=TEMP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY       
	/*performance change*/			
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
	select	CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,GU_PARTY_KEY 
	from	$$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY 
	group by 1,2) RCPH_SOLD_TO    
	ON RCPH_SOLD_TO.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=EDDP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY        
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE EBT     
	ON
            CASE
                WHEN EDDP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999  
			ELSE EDDP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
            END   = EBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY        
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_END_CUST    
	ON RCPH_END_CUST.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=EBT.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY       
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHN_SP_NODES  ECSN    
	ON EDDP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =ECSN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY       
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  RSH    
	ON EDDP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

SELECT 
    NBM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
    ,EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    --,EDC.CHANNEL_FLG
	,CASE
--WHEN NBM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='REBATES' THEN 'N'
WHEN EDC.LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD='DVAD' THEN 'Y'
--WHEN  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
WHEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
CASE WHEN EDC.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.SOLD_TO_GUK = EDC.END_CUST_GUK  THEN 'N'
                                   ELSE 'Y' END END     
WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
WHEN MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N' END AS CHANNEL_FLG	 
    ,EDC.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG
    ,'NON_DVAD' RTM_TYPE
    ,EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
     FROM 
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM,
     $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO , /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
   $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHNL_REV_MONTH_CNTL_MTH CRD,
    $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PART_CBF_MTH EDC
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH 
  ON EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT,
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS,
	 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
    /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
    WHERE CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
   AND NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  
    /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
    /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
   AND CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY <0  THEN NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END  = EDC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY= EDC.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND  CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
    THEN -777
    ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
    END   =  EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
      AND   NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = EDC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   AND   NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   AND   NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	AND CASE WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN  -1011801 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
       AND   NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('IND_ADJ') AND NBM.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y'
    AND   (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('%XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')  /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN  ('BPA-XAAS-Offset','BPA-OPL-INV') AND  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN  ('AR-TRXN-EXT'))
	OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING','OM-FBINV') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')
	OR (NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN  ('BPA-OM-Offset') AND  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN  ('AR-TRXN-EXT'))))/*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
	AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
      AND   NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD' /*NON DVAD records only*/
	  /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */ 
    AND (CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') AND NBM.BK_SS_CD='CG' THEN 
	COALESCE(NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)ELSE -999 END)=EDC.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY/*END*/
 UNION
 SELECT 
    NBM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
    ,EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    --,EDC.CHANNEL_FLG
	,CASE
--WHEN NBM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='REBATES' THEN 'N'
WHEN EDC.LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD='DVAD' THEN 'Y'
--WHEN  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
WHEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
CASE WHEN EDC.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.SOLD_TO_GUK = EDC.END_CUST_GUK  THEN 'N'
                                   ELSE 'Y' END END     
WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N' END AS CHANNEL_FLG	 
    ,EDC.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG
    ,'NON_DVAD' RTM_TYPE
    ,EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
     FROM 
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM,
     $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO , /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
   $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHNL_REV_MONTH_CNTL_MTH CRD,
    $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PART_CBF_MTH EDC
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH 
  ON EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT,
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS,
	 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
    /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
    WHERE CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
   AND NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  
    /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
    /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
   AND CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY <0  THEN NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END  = EDC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY= EDC.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND  CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
    THEN -777
    ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
    END   =  EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
      AND   NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = EDC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   AND   NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = EDC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   AND   NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	AND CASE WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN  -1011801 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
       AND   NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('IND_ADJ') AND NBM.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y'
    AND  ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')  /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN  ('BPA-XAAS-Offset','BPA-OPL-INV') AND  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN  ('AR-TRXN-EXT'))
	OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) /*Added OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
	OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	)
      /*AND   NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD'*/ /*NON DVAD records only*/
 AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE 'MANUAL%XAAS%'/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 AND   NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD'
 /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */ 
    AND (CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') AND NBM.BK_SS_CD='CG' THEN 
	COALESCE(NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)ELSE -999 END)=EDC.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY/*END*/

SELECT 
    NBM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
    ,EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    /* ,EDC.CHANNEL_FLG */
	,CASE
--WHEN NBM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='REBATES' THEN 'N'
WHEN EDC.LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD='DVAD' THEN 'Y'
--WHEN  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
WHEN EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
CASE WHEN EDC.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.SOLD_TO_GUK = EDC.END_CUST_GUK  THEN 'N'
                                   ELSE 'Y' END END     
WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
WHEN MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N' END AS CHANNEL_FLG	
    ,EDC.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG
    ,'NON_DVAD' RTM_TYPE
    ,EDC.AR_TRX_KEY 
  ,CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
     FROM 
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM,
     $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO , /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
    $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHNL_REV_MONTH_CNTL_MTH CRD,
    $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PART_CBF_MTH EDC
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH 
  ON EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT, /* Perf tuning changes*/
 ( SEL AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE GROUP BY 1,2 )NABS,
( 	SEL	AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD FROM	 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  GROUP BY 1,2,3 )NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
    /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
    WHERE CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999

  NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') AND NBM.BK_SS_CD='CG' THEN 
	NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY
   ELSE -999 END AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY /* added as part of athena Q2FY21*/,
   NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   'NON_XAAS' AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME1
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM
  /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
    INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO 
    ON CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
     WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
      WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
     ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHNL_REV_MONTH_CNTL_MTH CRD
  ON NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
  ON CASE WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN  -1011801 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('IND_ADJ')  AND NBM.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y'
  AND (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('%XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING','OM-FBINV') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
  OR (NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN  ('BPA-XAAS-Offset','BPA-OPL-INV') AND  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN  ('AR-TRXN-EXT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS') )	  ) /*Added OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
  AND NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD' /*Select NON DVAD records*/
  GROUP BY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY1,
  NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME1

SELECT 
   REP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   REP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   REP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   REP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   REP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   EBT.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
   BTP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY   AS BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   SPK.PARTY_KEY    AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   CASE 
   /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/   
   WHEN PB_PARTY.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL AND PB_PARTY.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY > 0 
   THEN  PB_PARTY.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  /*END */
    WHEN SPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999
    WHEN BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN COALESCE(SPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
    WHEN SPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
             THEN BPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
    WHEN SPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
             THEN SPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
        ELSE -999
   END  AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT_AS,
   CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT_AS =-999 AND SPK.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
      THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) 
   ELSE PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT_AS END AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   COALESCE(SPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   REP.AR_TRX_KEY,
   REP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   REP.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */,
  REP.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   FROM  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PATTERNS_MTH   REP
  
   INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE  EBT 
   ON  CASE WHEN REP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY END  =  EBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  
   INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE BTP 
   ON BTP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY  = CASE WHEN  REP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END
  
   INNER JOIN   (SELECT NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, NEP.PARTY_KEY , NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME
   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
   INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
   ON NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) SPK
  
   ON  CASE WHEN REP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999  ELSE REP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   END = SPK.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  SPS
   ON SPK.PARTY_KEY=SPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   AND SPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  BPS
   ON BTP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   AND BPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
   ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = REP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
   ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
   /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE PART_BILL
  ON(PART_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = REP.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PB_PARTY
  ON PART_BILL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=PB_PARTY.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND PB_PARTY.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N' 
  WHERE TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME='NON_XAAS'
 /* END */

SELECT 
   EDPI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDPI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDPI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDPI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDPI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   EDPI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
   EDPI.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   EDPI.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   EDPI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   EDPI.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  AS DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') AS PARTNER_COUNTRY,
   COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') AS DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
   EDPI.AR_TRX_KEY,
   EDPI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDPI.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */,
   EDPI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_PARTNER_MTH  EDPI
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SEL NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
     ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
     AND NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
     AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
     ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY) PART_CTRY
   ON EDPI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = PART_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SEL NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
     ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
     AND NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
     AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
     ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY ) END_CTRY
   ON EDPI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY
